name: 苔铃外庭 自动生成灰盒
goal: 穿过自动生成的大体量银河城灰盒：主线推进、支线奖励、捷径回环、Boss 前短跑。

world_story.worldview: 旧王朝建立在一口倒扣巨钟之上。巨钟压住深井黑潮，也吞掉活人的声音、誓言和未完成愿望。

protagonist.identity: 第七签署者留下的绯线回响，能看见命线、契约线和被删掉的名字残痕。

world_story.core_conflict: 继续重鸣能保住城市秩序，却延续活人声音作为封印材料；切断王冠能归还声音，却可能放出黑潮。真结局需要集齐六处证词，用绯线改写契约。
truth_ladder: 盐白契约删掉第七签署者。
六枚印记曾是六位活人守门者心脏。
失败巡礼者被重编为静音军队。
第七签署者把改写契约的后门藏进绯线。
endings: 重鸣：城市安全但名字仍在钟里。
断冠：声音归还但黑潮涌出。
绯线真结局：钟声只封黑潮，不再吞人声。

bell_key.name: 敌群
bell_key.description: 唤醒捷径钟门的锈蚀战斗标记。

thread_burst.name: 绯线爆裂
thread_burst.description: 消耗30点能量，打出一次重型线刃。

menders_right.name: 缝补右手
menders_right.description: 鼠标右键消耗60点能量，恢复1点生命。

moss_lens.name: 苔光镜
moss_lens.description: 会记录已探索房间的破损镜片。

crown_splinter.name: 王冠裂片
crown_splinter.description: 锈冠守卫体内仍带余温的金属碎片。

map_rooms.name: 旧驿门厅1
map_rooms.objective: 旧驿门厅1：按自动生成灰盒推进，识别主线、支线、捷径和回访门。
map_rooms.guide: 红线主线转成连续地面；上下层支线以平台桥和竖井回接；奖励死胡同必须有道具或 NPC。
map_rooms.danger: 支线房有更多陷阱和敌人，Boss 前 2-3 房保留短跑与存档。
map_rooms.design_goal: Teach the first landmark, safe footing, and the chapter visual language.
map_rooms.reward_contract: orientation, map silhouette, first safe return point
map_rooms.micro_objective: Enter safely, read the bell tower silhouette, and learn the main route color language.
map_rooms.landmark: broken station gate under a hanging moss bell
map_rooms.mechanic_prompt: Safe floor, one optional ledge, no punishment.
map_rooms.playtest_note: Player should understand the first destination within ten seconds.

map_rooms.name: 旧驿门厅2
map_rooms.objective: 旧驿门厅2：按自动生成灰盒推进，识别主线、支线、捷径和回访门。
map_rooms.guide: 红线主线转成连续地面；上下层支线以平台桥和竖井回接；奖励死胡同必须有道具或 NPC。
map_rooms.danger: 支线房有更多陷阱和敌人，Boss 前 2-3 房保留短跑与存档。
map_rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
map_rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

map_rooms.name: 旧驿门厅3

map_rooms.reward_contract: foreshadowed destination
map_rooms.micro_objective: Rest at the first save and see a locked return path above the main route.
map_rooms.landmark: small balcony save point looking over the entry spine
map_rooms.mechanic_prompt: Show an upper route before it is useful.
map_rooms.playtest_note: Player should remember this balcony when a later shortcut opens.

map_rooms.playtest_note: Optional pocket should not feel like the critical path.

map_rooms.playtest_note: Player should see why opening this will shorten travel.

map_rooms.name: 苔钟前庭1

map_rooms.micro_objective: Choose between the main path, upper shaft, and reward branch while keeping the bell tower visible.
map_rooms.landmark: wide bell court with three visible exits
map_rooms.playtest_note: This room is the first place the map should feel non-linear but readable.

map_rooms.playtest_note: Falling should return the player to a known floor, not punish heavily.

map_rooms.micro_objective: Enter the rain canopy loop and read both the high branch and lower return route.
map_rooms.playtest_note: Player should see at least two exits without opening the map.

map_rooms.name: 雨棚廊桥2

map_rooms.design_goal: Immediately prove the value of a new ability before using it as a gate.
map_rooms.reward_contract: new ability and one obvious use case
map_rooms.micro_objective: Pick up the first chapter ability and immediately use it to cross a short, safe span.
map_rooms.landmark: thread hook shrine above the canopy
map_rooms.mechanic_prompt: New ability, then one obvious application.
map_rooms.playtest_note: Failing the tutorial jump should reset locally without long travel.

map_rooms.reward_contract: spatial memory and return-path compression
map_rooms.micro_objective: Talk to the route hint NPC, then choose main bridge or lower loop.
map_rooms.playtest_note: NPC line should confirm that the area loops back.

map_rooms.objective: 主母巢厅4：按自动生成灰盒推进，识别主线、支线、捷径和回访门。
map_rooms.guide: 红线主线转成连续地面；上下层支线以平台桥和竖井回接；奖励死胡同必须有道具或 NPC。
map_rooms.danger: 支线房有更多陷阱和敌人，Boss 前 2-3 房保留短跑与存档。
map_rooms.design_goal: Keep the final approach tense but short after a save point.
map_rooms.reward_contract: boss anticipation without long death runback
map_rooms.micro_objective: Save, read the boss silhouette, and prepare for a short final approach.
map_rooms.landmark: quiet bench under the outer court bell tower
map_rooms.playtest_note: Death runback target is under three rooms.

npcs.name: 地图证人1
dialogue: 这片区域不是直线，记住回来的门。
走到死路时先找奖励，再看有没有从背面开的捷径。
Boss 前的短路已经留好，别把长回跑当成难度。
npcs.identity: 自动生成灰盒 NPC，用于提示路线与能力回访。
npcs.motive: 帮助玩家理解大地图回环。
npcs.help: 提示主线、支线、捷径和奖励死胡同。

asset_policy.progression: combat_clear: defeat all configured normal enemies to open the boss route; no route tokens are required.

design_note.intent: Playable CH01 world uses the same two-dimensional room rectangles as the generated ManiaMap draft.

generation.design_reference: 大体量银河恶魔城通用结构：主线、支线、能力门、捷径闭环、Boss 前短跑；不复刻商业地图。

legend.optional_branch: side branch reachable by base movement
legend.opened_shortcut: shortcut opened from the far side or lever
legend.ability_locked: backtrack gate requiring a chapter ability
